code:
import io
import string
import list

fn main() -> Result<Unit, String>
  let line1 = io.read_line().ok_or("missing line 1")?
  let line2 = io.read_line().ok_or("missing line 2")?

  let tokens = string.split_whitespace(line1)
  mut nums: List<Int> = []
  mut i = 0
  while i < tokens.len()
    let tok = tokens.get(i).ok_or("token oob")?
    let n = string.parse_int(tok).ok_or("parse number")?
    nums = list.push(nums, n)
    i = i + 1
  end

  let target = string.parse_int(string.trim(line2)).ok_or("parse target")?

  mut lo = 0
  mut hi = nums.len()
  mut found = -1
  mut done = false
  while lo < hi and not done
    let mid = (lo + hi) / 2
    let v = nums.get(mid).ok_or("mid oob")?
    if v == target
      found = mid
      done = true
    else if v < target
      lo = mid + 1
    else
      hi = mid
    end
  end

  if found == -1
    print("not_found")
  else
    print("index=#{found}")
  end
  Ok(())
end
